pages.title: Whistle on the River
pages.tagline: Step aboard a noir riverboat where cartoon physics meet leth

pages.body: Welcome to 'Whistle on the River,' a gritty boom bap journey at ninety-four beats per minute that blends dirty dockside crime narratives with a sinister nineteen-twenties aesthetic. Imagine dusty drums and upright bass stabs weaving through vinyl hiss, all underpinning raspy aggressive male vocals over a dark piano loop. This track masks lethal threats behind playful visuals of cartoon gloves and rubber-hose animation, creating a world where violence disguised as play defines the atmosphere. As you navigate from ominous anticipation to an industrial crescendo, remember that while old school grins feature gangsta leans, steam in the pipes makes the whole boat mean. It is a monochromatic tale where fog on base signals deals going down and rat-tat rhythms shake wooden floors.
pages.styleSentence: A gritty 94 BPM boom bap track blending dirty dockside crime narratives with a sinister 1920s cartoon aesthetic, featuring dusty drums, upright bass stabs, vinyl hiss, and raspy aggressive male vocals over a dark piano loop.

pages.caption: A noir riverboat meets rubber-hose cartoons; smoke stacks cough dreams while cartoon gloves hide real hammers amidst industrial decay and da

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Raspy vocals narrate the crime story with lethal wit.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Layers voices to create a sinister, echoing gangster chorus.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Dusty kicks keep time like footsteps on wooden planks.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Crisp hits mimic rat-tat rhythms and hatch impacts.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Upright stabs ground the track with deep, gritty weight.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Dark piano loops set a cinematic, monochromatic mood.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Vinyl hiss and industrial textures fill every shadowed corner.

levels.name: FOG ANTICIPATION
levels.emotion: Mysterious, ominous anticipation of a crime story beginning.

levels.name: DOCKSIDE INTRO
levels.emotion: Playful yet menacing introduction to characters on a dangerous boat.

levels.name: INDUSTRIAL NOISE
levels.emotion: Final crescendo of industrial noise and criminal threat.

levels.name: DEADLY REALIZATION
levels.emotion: Aggressive realization that the cartoon facade is deadly real.
